---
title: "About"
description: "About Jiho Min, a student developer interested in AI tools, web development, finance, and practical software projects."
---

::: {.site-shell .page-shell}
::: {.page-hero}
::: {.eyebrow}
About
:::

# A student developer learning by building.

I’m Jiho Min, a student developer interested in AI tools, web development, productivity systems, finance, and practical software projects. I use this website to organize what I am building, what I am learning, and the notes I want to keep public.
:::

::: {.split-section}
::: {.panel-card}
## Interests

- AI tools for studying and writing
- Web apps that solve small real problems
- Productivity systems and browser workflows
- Finance, economics, and clear explanations
- Bilingual communication and translation
:::

::: {.panel-card}
## Currently learning

- Better frontend architecture
- Cleaner UI systems and responsive design
- Practical AI workflows
- Project documentation and maintainability
- How to turn ideas into small shipped products
:::
:::

::: {.panel-card}
## What I like building

I like building focused tools that are simple enough to use quickly but structured enough to improve over time. Good projects for me usually start with a real problem, a small prototype, and a clear plan for what to test next.
:::
:::
